about.title: NicheHome.ch – Premium Home Fragrances in Switzerland
about.subtitle: Official Swiss destination for By Velcheva
about.content: Welcome to NicheHome.ch, the official Swiss destination for premium home fragrances by the boutique brand By Velcheva. We specialize in elegant aroma diffusers, scented candles, interior perfumes, textile sprays, and luxury car fragrances, designed to transform any living space into a refined sensory experience. Our philosophy is simple: A home fragrance is not just a scent — it is atmosphere, emotion, and interior design in its purest form. About the Brand – By Velcheva By Velcheva is an international premium brand known for its sophisticated aromatic compositions and stylish aesthetic. Each product is crafted with high-quality fragrance oils, clean ingredients, and long-lasting diffusion technology. The brand's collection ranges from warm, cozy notes to fresh botanical accords and vibrant fruity signatures, making it suitable for every home and lifestyle. Every candle, diffuser, and spray is created with meticulous attention to detail — from the formula to the minimalistic packaging — reflecting the brand's core values: elegance, purity, and sensory harmony. Our Mission in Switzerland At NicheHome.ch, we bring the world of luxury home perfumery to Switzerland. We provide fast delivery, exclusive limited editions, and premium customer service for: • Private clients • Interior designers • Boutique hotels • Wellness and beauty studios • Corporate and retail spaces Whether you're scenting a home, office, showroom, or gifting something special, we offer premium solutions tailored to elevate every environment. Why Choose NicheHome.ch ✔ Official Swiss platform for By Velcheva ✔ Long-lasting and high-quality fragrances ✔ Clean, aesthetic, interior-friendly design ✔ Fast shipping within Switzerland ✔ Premium gift options for any occasion Our products suit those who appreciate beautiful interiors, refined atmospheres, and high-end sensory experiences.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Complete Terms and Conditions for the NicheHome.ch online store
terms.section_1_title: 1. Scope of Application and Contracting Party
terms.section_1_body:
These Terms and Conditions govern all purchases made through this online store. The store is operated from Switzerland by Evgen Smelyanskiy (Einzelfirma, CHE-192.677.429), Hardstrasse 39, 5430 Wettingen, Switzerland, email: info@nichehome.ch.

A contractual relationship arises between the customer ("you") and the store operator ("we"). These Terms apply to all orders for delivery or pickup within Switzerland and Liechtenstein. By placing an order, you confirm that you have read and accept these Terms.
terms.section_2_body: We strive to describe products as accurately as possible and provide up-to-date photos. However, minor differences in color, packaging design, or details are possible due to monitor settings, manufacturer changes, or lighting conditions. Product availability is not guaranteed until the order is confirmed. Adding a product to the cart does not mean the product is reserved or availability is confirmed. If after placing an order it turns out that a product is unavailable, we will promptly notify you and fully refund the cost of unavailable items.
terms.section_3_body: All prices on the site are shown in Swiss Francs (CHF). Prices include all mandatory taxes (e.g., VAT) unless explicitly stated otherwise. Shipping costs are not included in the product price and are displayed separately during checkout before confirmation. If a shipping method involves additional costs, these costs will be shown before final order confirmation.
terms.section_4_body:
We deliver throughout Switzerland and Liechtenstein. Estimated delivery times are typically 2–5 business days but may vary depending on carrier workload, holidays, and other factors beyond our control. After the order is handed over to the postal or courier service, responsibility for any delays related to these services lies with the respective carriers.

When selecting pickup, the product is prepared for collection at the selected branch. We will notify you by email and/or SMS when the order is ready for pickup. Pickup is provided free of charge.
terms.section_5_body: According to Art. 185 of the Swiss Code of Obligations (OR), the risk of accidental loss or damage to the goods passes to the customer at the time of delivery to the transport service (for delivery) or at the time of actual handover of the goods to the customer (for pickup).
terms.section_7_body: Available payment methods are displayed during checkout. We reserve the right to restrict available payment methods for individual orders or customers. If payment cannot be successfully processed, the order is automatically cancelled.
terms.section_8_title: 8. Returns, Exchanges, and Your Rights Under Swiss Law
terms.section_10_body: We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages, lost profits, or delays caused by postal or courier services, to the extent permitted by applicable Swiss law. Our liability is limited to damage caused by intentional acts or gross negligence on our part.
terms.section_11_body: We process your personal data in accordance with the Swiss Federal Data Protection Act (revDSG), and where applicable, the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) for customers from Liechtenstein. Detailed information on the processing of personal data is set out in our Privacy Policy, which is an integral part of these Terms.
terms.section_12_body: All texts, images, logos, design, and site structure are subject to copyright and other intellectual property rights. Any copying, distribution, or use of site materials without our prior written permission is prohibited.
terms.section_13_body:
These Terms are governed exclusively by Swiss substantive law. The place of jurisdiction is Wettingen, Switzerland, unless otherwise provided by mandatory provisions of applicable law.

If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, this does not affect the validity of the remaining provisions. We reserve the right to update and amend these Terms; the version in effect at the time of order placement applies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Data Protection and Privacy Information
privacy.section_1_body:
The operator of this online store and controller of personal data processing is:

Evgen Smelyanskiy
Einzelfirma
CHE-192.677.429
Hardstrasse 39
5430 Wettingen
Switzerland

Email: info@nichehome.ch

For all questions regarding data protection, personal data processing, and exercising your rights, please contact us at the email address above.
privacy.section_2_body:
This Privacy Policy describes what personal data we collect, how we use it, to whom we disclose it, how long we store it, and what rights you have regarding your data. This Policy applies to all users of our online store in Switzerland and Liechtenstein.

We process personal data in accordance with the Swiss Federal Data Protection Act (revDSG), and where applicable, the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) for customers from Liechtenstein.
privacy.section_3_body:
We collect and process the following categories of personal data:

3.1. Order Data:
- First and last name
- Email address
- Phone number
- Delivery and/or pickup address
- Payment information (processed through secure payment services)
- Order information (products, quantities, prices)

3.2. Account Registration Data:
- First and last name
- Email address
- Password (stored encrypted)
- Order history and preferences

3.3. Technical Data:
- IP address
- Browser and device information
- Site interaction data (pages viewed, visit times)
- Cookie information

3.4. Feedback Data:
- Messages through contact forms
- Support requests
- Product reviews (if provided)

Purposes of processing:
- Fulfilling the sales contract (processing and delivering orders)
- Managing customer accounts
- Processing payments
- Customer service and responding to inquiries
- Improving website and user experience
- Complying with legal obligations (e.g., tax and accounting law)
privacy.section_4_body:
We process your personal data on the following legal bases:

- Contract performance: processing is necessary to fulfill the sales contract between you and us (order processing, delivery, communication).
- Legal obligations: processing is necessary to comply with legal requirements (Swiss tax and accounting law).
- Consent: for certain operations (e.g., marketing communications, optional cookies) we request your explicit consent, which you can withdraw at any time.
- Legitimate interests: processing may be based on our legitimate interests (e.g., website improvement, fraud protection, technical administration), provided these interests do not override your rights and freedoms.
privacy.section_5_body:
We retain your personal data only as long as necessary to achieve the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law:

- Order data: 10 years (in accordance with Swiss tax and accounting law)
- Account data: while the account is active or until deletion request
- Technical data and logs: no more than 12 months
- Feedback data: until request resolution plus reasonable period (typically no more than 3 years)

After these periods, data is deleted or anonymized.
privacy.section_6_body:
Under applicable data protection law, you have the following rights:

- Right of access: you may request information about what personal data we process about you.
- Right to rectification: you may request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
- Right to erasure: you may request deletion of your data if it is no longer needed for the purposes collected, or if you have withdrawn consent.
- Right to restriction: in certain cases you may request restriction of data processing.
- Right to object: you may object to processing based on legitimate interests.
- Right to data portability: you may request transfer of your data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format.

To exercise these rights or file a complaint, contact info@nichehome.ch. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the relevant data protection supervisory authority.
privacy.section_7_body:
We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, loss, alteration, or disclosure. These measures include:

- Data transmission encryption (SSL/TLS)
- Secure password storage (hashing)
- Restricted access to personal data only to authorized personnel
- Regular security system updates
- Data backups

However, no system can guarantee 100% protection. We recommend also taking precautions when using the internet (e.g., not sharing passwords with third parties).
privacy.section_8_body:
We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. We may share your data with the following categories of recipients only to the extent necessary to fulfill our obligations:

- Shipping services: to fulfill orders (name, address, phone shared)
- Payment systems: to process payments (data processed in accordance with PCI DSS)
- IT services: hosting, technical support (only as necessary for website operation)
- Legal and tax authorities: when legally required

All our partners are obligated to comply with data protection requirements and use data only within the scope of services provided.

Data transfers outside Switzerland/EEA occur only with adequate data protection levels (adequacy decision, standard contractual clauses, or other appropriate safeguards).
privacy.section_9_body:
Our site uses cookies — small text files stored on your device to ensure website functionality and improve user experience.

Types of cookies used:

- Necessary cookies: required for basic website functions (e.g., cart, session). These do not require consent as the site cannot function without them.
- Analytical cookies: help us understand how visitors use the site to improve it. Use of these requires your consent.
- Marketing cookies: used to display relevant advertising. Use of these requires your consent.

You can manage cookie settings in your browser. Disabling necessary cookies may affect website functionality.
privacy.section_10_body:
We reserve the right to update and modify this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in legislation, our data processing practices, or for other reasons. For substantial changes, we will notify you via the website or email.

We recommend periodically checking this page for the current version of the Policy.

Last updated: December 2024.

aromaMarketing.subtitle: Professional scenting solutions for your business
aromaMarketing.content:
Transform your business environment with our professional aroma marketing services. We offer customized scenting solutions for hotels, retail stores, offices, and other commercial spaces.

Our team works with you to create a unique olfactory identity that enhances customer experience and brand recognition.
aromaMarketing.formSuccess: Thank you for your inquiry. Our team will contact you within 24 hours.
